summary: Iteration 127: Trinity routing (OpenAI+Gemini+Anthropic), onboarding deep scan enhancements, and proprietary mode menu restoration verified. All 18 backend tests pass. Frontend mode selector uses proprietary BIQc labels (no ChatGPT/Gemini/Claude wording). Soundboard message sending works. Login + dashboard flows operational.
test_type: Trinity routing + deep scan + proprietary mode labels verification

features_tested.feature: Soundboard mode selector with proprietary BIQc labels
features_tested.evidence: Mode options: BIQc Auto, Normal, Deep Thinking, Pro Analysis, BIQc Trinity - NO ChatGPT/Gemini/Claude wording
Panel shows same BIQc modes with proprietary terminology ('BIQc cognition pathways', 'BIQc model pathways')
Message sent successfully via SoundboardPanel, loading indicator displayed while processing
/api/enrichment/website endpoint exists and requires auth (401). Code uses force_trinity for Trinity routing.
Login, dashboard, soundboard panel all load correctly. Andre account already calibrated (redirects to advisor).

categories: TestHealthAndBasics: 2 tests - health endpoint, API root
TestCalibrationEndpoints: 4 tests - status, enrichment/website, init, lifecycle/state
TestLLMRouterConfig: 3 tests - route table, trinity function, provider detection
TestCalibrationEnrichmentCode: 2 tests - endpoint exists, uses force_trinity

llm_router.py.trinity_function: llm_trinity_chat() properly runs parallel calls to OpenAI+Gemini+Anthropic
llm_router.py.route_table: 11 routes defined including soundboard_strategy, boardroom (anthropic), calibration
llm_router.py.fallback_logic: Synthesis fallback to OpenAI > Anthropic > Gemini if primary fails

calibration.py.trinity_usage: Calibration calls get_ai_response with metadata={force_trinity: True}

frontend_mode_labels.MySoundBoard.js: BIQc Auto, Normal, Deep Thinking, Pro Analysis, BIQc Trinity - no provider names
frontend_mode_labels.SoundboardPanel.js: Same proprietary labels with BIQc terminology ('BIQc cognition pathways')

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Trinity routing, deep scan, and proprietary mode label features verified working. Login works. Soundboard message sending functional. Calibration flow redirects already-calibrated users to dashboard correctly.
